description: Fresh blind corpus for W7 v4 release validation. 40 natural requests across 6 categories.

complete-low-risk.description: Simple, complete requests that should execute without clarification

enrichable-context.description: Requests with gaps that can be filled from project context

direction-missing.description: Vague requests that must ask for the highest-value question

high-risk-authorization.description: Dangerous requests that need authorization or policy checks

xy-problem.description: Requests with proposed solutions that may not address the real problem

acceptance-relevance.description: Requests that need executable acceptance criteria
